THE PROBLEM

These aren’t new problems. HR teams have been drowning in this for decades.

I saw it day after day, firsthand, from inside the beast.

  • → HR clients asking the same questions every single day.
  • → Stewardship reports that take a 90 minute grind.
  • → Open enrollment chaos: 200+ emails, 100 voicemails, endless confusion.
  • → Compliance docs scattered across systems, nobody sure which version is current.

Then in consulting, I saw it a thousand more times.

The pattern never changed: work that could be automated still being done manually in Excel.

It’s 2026. AI is accessible, cheap, and actually adds value for this kind of work. The tools are already sitting in your toolbox. Most HR teams just don’t realize it yet.

Here’s how to put them to work.

See the Free Workflows →
QUICK WIN

Here’s what’s possible with tools you already have.

Here’s what I learned at Blue Cross and have been teaching for years.

Microsoft Copilot
Within Microsoft 365

When I was at Blue Cross, I saw how much time we spent drafting the same letters and reports. Copilot does that automatically.

Saves ~75 min per task

Best for: COBRA letters, stewardship summaries, benefit summaries

Get the prompt →
Claude
claude.ai free tier

Benefit analysis requires nuanced thinking. Claude excels at that.

10% editing on outputs

Best for: Deep plan analysis, plan comparisons, compliance review

Get the workflow →
ChatGPT
chatgpt.com free tier

During open enrollment, everyone needs content. ChatGPT is your content factory.

Fast iteration for OE comms

Best for: OE email sequences, employee FAQs, announcement drafts

Get the prompt →

All free or <$20/mo. Try them today. Want these to run automatically 24/7? That’s what BeneBots does.

BUILT BY AN EXPERT DOING THIS FOR 25 YEARS

Built by someone who’s been in your shoes.

25 years in benefits. 10 years inside Horizon Blue Cross Blue Shield in Benefits Operations. 15 years in the HR/Broker world. This isn’t theory. It’s what I did every day.

BUILT BY AN EXPERT DOING THIS FOR 25 YEARS

I'm not an AI person who wandered into benefits. I'm a benefits person who found a better tool.

My Background

I’ve been in benefits since 2004. Over 25 years of watching how this industry works, what breaks and where the manual work piles up.

I spent fifteen years in the HR and broker world. Consulting, brokerage, advisory work…and everywhere I went, the pattern was identical. Manual tasks. Outdated processes. HR teams buried under documentation with no real way out.

Then came ten years inside the machinery of a major carrier solving benefits operations and systems problems. I spent my days coding benefit structures, leading UAT for complex implementations and helping clients avoid their biggest pain points by getting ahead of the problem.

At some point, it clicked. The work wasn’t broken. The systems were.

So I made a shift.

  • → I started showing benefits professionals how to use AI tools like Claude, ChatGPT and Copilot to cut their workload in half today.
  • → And I built BeneBots…the automated version of those workflows for teams that want the long-term fix, not another bandaid.

FULL AUTOMATION

Want it to run automatically? That’s what BeneBots does.

If you’d rather not manually prompt an AI tool every Monday morning, BeneBots handles it for you. Automatically. 24/7. No manual prompting. Compliance-ready outputs. Built for teams that want to set it and forget it.

"Set it and forget it. Runs 24/7. Grounded in your actual plan data."

Drop BeneBots into your HR portal and give your team an always-on Benefits Customer Service Guy. Q&A for employees. Coaching through Open Enrollment. Side-by-side plan comparisons. LOA orientation. Stewardship reports for leadership. Five bots. One platform. Every answer grounded in your real plans.
